page.title: Settings
page.description: Choose which runtime application this browser tab uses for executions.

runtime.title: Runtime application
runtime.description: Execution requests, realtime updates, projects, and reports use the selected application.
runtime.defaultDescription: Uses the dashboard's built-in execution API route.
runtime.loadErrorTitle: Runtime catalog could not be loaded
runtime.loadErrorDescription: Default App is still available. Try again later to choose a runtime application.
